{
  "test_scenarios": [
    {
      "id": "TC-001",
      "type": "positive",
      "title": "Create a new post with valid payload",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts is reachable",
      "test_data": "{\"userId\":1,\"title\":\"Sample title\",\"body\":\"Sample body content\"}",
      "expected_result": "Response status 201, response JSON contains userId 1, title \"Sample title\", body \"Sample body content\", and an automatically generated numeric id field",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-002",
      "type": "negative",
      "title": "Create a new post missing required field 'title'",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts is reachable",
      "test_data": "{\"userId\":1,\"body\":\"Sample body content\"}",
      "expected_result": "Throws 400 Bad Request or returns status code other than 201 indicating validation failure",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-003",
      "type": "boundary",
      "title": "Create a new post with maximum length title and body",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts is reachable",
      "test_data": "{\"userId\":1,\"title\":\"" + "A".repeat(255) + "\",\"body\":\"" + "B".repeat(5000) + "\"}",
      "expected_result": "Response status 201 and response JSON includes the same long title and body values with a generated id",
      "priority": "Low"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-004",
      "type": "negative",
      "title": "Create a new post with non-integer userId",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts is reachable",
      "test_data": "{\"userId\":\"one\",\"title\":\"Sample\",\"body\":\"Sample\"}",
      "expected_result": "Throws 400 Bad Request or returns status code other than 201 due to type mismatch",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-005",
      "type": "integration",
      "title": "Create post then retrieve the same user information",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts and https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 are reachable",
      "test_data": "POST payload {\"userId\":1,\"title\":\"Integration test\",\"body\":\"Testing\"} followed by GET /users/1",
      "expected_result": "POST returns status 201 with generated id, GET /users/1 returns status 200 and user data with id 1; no state persistence is required as dummy API always returns static user data",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-006",
      "type": "clarification",
      "title": "Verify behavior when POST payload includes extra undefined fields",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts is reachable",
      "test_data": "{\"userId\":1,\"title\":\"Extra\",\"body\":\"Field\",\"extraField\":\"value\"}",
      "expected_result": "Missing_information: unclear whether extra fields are ignored or cause error; test to be defined after clarification",
      "priority": "Low"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-007",
      "type": "positive",
      "title": "Retrieve user information for a valid user ID",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 is reachable",
      "test_data": "GET request to /users/1",
      "expected_result": "Response status 200 and JSON contains fields id, name, username, email, address, phone, website, company with id equal to 1",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-008",
      "type": "negative",
      "title": "Retrieve user information with non-existent user ID",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/9999 is reachable",
      "test_data": "GET request to /users/9999",
      "expected_result": "Response status 404 Not Found or empty body as per API definition",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-009",
      "type": "boundary",
      "title": "Retrieve user information with user ID zero",
      "preconditions": "API endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/0 is reachable",
      "test_data": "GET request to /users/0",
      "expected_result": "Response status 404 Not Found or appropriate error indicating invalid ID",
      "priority": "Low"
    },
    {
      "id": "TC-010",
      "type": "clarification",
      "title": "Determine exact GET /users/{id} request parameters and response schema",
      "preconditions": "None",
      "test_data": "N/A",
      "expected_result": "Missing_information: request parameters and full response schema are not provided in requirements; need clarification before detailed test design",
      "priority": "Low"
    }
  ]
}
